data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the system sends email confirmations upon booking. The absence of any related evidence or confirmation of this functionality indicates a gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent to customers upon booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
